channel.title: Fashion Store
channel.description: Free Fashion Store Elementor Template - SastraWP Theme

item.title: Womens Summer Tank
item.dc:creator: spexoadmin
item.content:encoded: Elevate your style with the timeless allure of our CelestialStride Metallic Sneakers, where comfort meets glamour in each step. Walk the fashion-forward path with confidence, making a statement that transcends trends.
item.excerpt:encoded:
• Versatile Wardrobe Staples
  • Statement Accessories
  • Seasonal Trends
  • Comfortable Footwear
  • Mix of Textures
  • Personalized Touch
